title: Agent Behavior Enrichment — Status Icons, Idle Tiers, Wandering

tasks.title: Add 'offline' AgentStatus, 3-tier idle detection, and expose idle tier on Character

dod.criterion: AgentStatus type is 'working' | 'idle' | 'offline' in both pixel-types.ts and types.ts
IdleTier type ('recent' | 'moderate' | 'long') exists in pixel-types.ts and Character struct has an idleTier field
characters.ts computes idleTier from sessionInfo.lastActivityMs: <10min='recent', 10-30min='moderate', >=30min='long'. Thresholds are named constants in constants.ts
GamePage.tsx toAgentStatus returns 'offline' for agents with no active session. agentStatuses priority map includes 'offline' ranked below 'idle'
officeState.ts applyAgentStatus handles 'offline' without errors (agents go to desk, stay seated like idle). shouldWander uses idleTier === 'long' instead of raw timestamp comparison

tasks.title: Distinct visual treatment per idle tier in renderer and panels

dod.criterion: PILL_DOT_COLORS has entries: working (green), idle-recent (muted green), idle-moderate (amber), idle-long (gray), offline (dark gray)
STATUS_EMOJI differentiates by idle tier: recent=none, moderate=sleepy face, long=coffee (existing)
Character sprites render at full opacity (no alpha dimming)
panelUtils.ts statusBadgeVariant, statusDotColor, and StatusChip handle 'offline' status with distinct styling
Type-checks pass: npm run type-check exits 0

tasks.title: Remove renderStatusIcons and renderInteractionIcons dead code

dod.criterion: renderStatusIcons function definition is deleted from renderer.ts
renderInteractionIcons function definition is deleted from renderer.ts
Both call sites in renderFrame() are removed
No remaining references to renderStatusIcons or renderInteractionIcons exist anywhere in the codebase
Type-checks pass: npm run type-check exits 0

tasks.title: Furniture-first wandering, chat facing, activity animations, interaction points

dod.criterion: pickWanderDestination: ~85% furniture interaction, ~15% social approach. Fallback to zone waypoints if all points occupied. 3-attempt retry loop for unreachable destinations.
Chat facing: interacting agents face each other via direction override in render loop
Activity animations for all types: exercising bounces, ping pong swings, pool shifts, arcade/couch uses typing sprite, vending uses reading sprite
20+ interaction points: kitchen chairs, couches (arcade/PS5), gym mats (4), pool stools (2), ping pong (2-player above/below), TV, vending machines, break room chairs
30-min idle threshold (WANDER_IDLE_THRESHOLD_MS): agents idle <30min stay at workspace desk, >30min wander to break room/kitchen
No alpha dimming on any agents (charAlpha hardcoded to 1.0)
Mobile: name pills render at minimum 0.7 zoom scale instead of hiding below 0.8. Task info cards and AgentTicker hidden on mobile.
Meeting zone marked restricted to prevent unreachable pathfinding from main area
Type-checks pass: npm run type-check exits 0
